channel.title: ViralDeals - Health & Wellness
channel.description: Curated trending health & wellness from Amazon India.

item.title: Must-Have Sanitizing Spray for Home! 💦
item.description: Stay safe and germ-free this summer with Amazon Brand - Presto! Disinfectant Toilet Cleaner. Its 2-litre pack ensures long-lasting protection and kills 99.9% of germs. Easy to use and removes tough stains, this toilet cleaner is a must-have for every Indian household.
